title: BarkinMad Coins in ZXPong
description: How BarkinMad Coins work with ZXPong sessions, collectible court coins, cosmetic unlocks, and shared ZX Series wallet progression.
summary: BarkinMad Coins connect ZXPong gameplay rewards with shared ZX Series progression and cosmetic unlocks.
heroImageAlt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series documentation asset

images.alt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series reference
images.caption: Shared BarkinMad Coins artwork

sections.heading: What it is
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are the shared progression currency model used across supported ZX Series games.
In ZXPong, coins support long-term progression and cosmetic unlocks such as paddle skins.

sections.heading: How ZXPong uses coins
paragraphs: The ZXPong gameplay model includes collectible coins and Solo reward calculations based on match results, AI difficulty, and longest rally.
The app also uses the shared ZX wallet, so coin balance is part of the wider ZX Series progression surface.

sections.heading: Cosmetic unlocks
paragraphs: ZXPong includes unlockable paddle skins. Classic is the default skin, with additional skins unlocked through coins.
Playable skin names include Classic, Red, Neon, Cyanic, Golden, and Obsidian.

faq.question: Do BarkinMad Coins have real-world value?
faq.answer: No. BarkinMad Coins are in-app progression currency and have no cash value.
